name: Chestnut, Walnut & Red Wine Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
3. Mix until well combined.
4. Transfer the mixture to a greased loaf pan.
5. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Allow the loaf to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing it and slicing.
